name: to_postgres
description: Export parquet data to PostgreSQL wide tables
output_format: PostgreSQL tables: `<table_prefix><experience>__<step>__<aggregation>` (one table per domain/aggregation combination)

table_prefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to all table names

mode.description: Write mode: append (insert new rows only), replace (truncate data, keep schema), reset (drop and recreate table from scratch)

aggregations.description: List of aggregation windows to export (e.g. ["10s", "60s"]). Empty = all available windows.

sources.description: List of domain sources to export. Each entry: domain (required), then optional filters: devices (list of device ids, e.g. ["pil-78"]), sensors (list of sensor names or patterns, e.g. ["m*", "outdoor_temp"]), transforms (list of transform names or patterns), metrics (list of metric names or patterns, e.g. ["mean", "std"]), columns (explicit list of full column names, takes priority over sensors/transforms/metrics). Wildcards (fnmatch) supported in sensors/transforms/metrics.
